ADD_MRP.description: Compose two Modified Rodrigues Parameter rotations.

SUB_MRP.description: Compute the relative Modified Rodrigues Parameter rotation from VECTOR_B to VECTOR_A.

MRP_SHADOW.description: Force a Modified Rodrigues Parameter vector to its shadow set.

MRP_SWITCH.description: Switch to the MRP shadow set when norm exceeds SWITCH_THRESHOLD.

EP_TO_MRP.description: Convert scalar-first Euler parameters/quaternion to MRP.

MRP_TO_EP.description: Convert MRP to scalar-first Euler parameters/quaternion.

DCM_TO_EP.description: Convert direction cosine matrix to scalar-first Euler parameters/quaternion.

EP_TO_DCM.description: Convert scalar-first Euler parameters/quaternion to direction cosine matrix.

DCM_TO_MRP.description: Convert direction cosine matrix to Modified Rodrigues Parameters.

MRP_TO_DCM.description: Convert Modified Rodrigues Parameters to direction cosine matrix.

B_MATRIX_MRP.description: Return the MRP B matrix that maps body angular rate to MRP derivative.

B_INV_MATRIX_MRP.description: Return the inverse MRP B matrix that maps MRP derivative to body angular rate.

D_MRP.description: Compute MRP derivative from MRP and body angular rate vectors.

D_MRP_TO_OMEGA.description: Compute body angular rate from MRP and MRP derivative vectors.

B_DOT_MATRIX_MRP.description: Return the MRP B-dot matrix from MRP and MRP derivative vectors.

DD_MRP.description: Compute second MRP derivative from MRP, MRP derivative, body rate, and body acceleration.

DD_MRP_TO_D_OMEGA.description: Compute body angular acceleration from MRP, MRP derivative, and second MRP derivative.

SUB_GIBBS.description: Compute the relative Gibbs-vector rotation from VECTOR_B to VECTOR_A.

EP_TO_GIBBS.description: Convert scalar-first Euler parameters/quaternion to Gibbs vector.

GIBBS_TO_EP.description: Convert Gibbs vector to scalar-first Euler parameters/quaternion.

DCM_TO_GIBBS.description: Convert direction cosine matrix to Gibbs vector.

GIBBS_TO_DCM.description: Convert Gibbs vector to direction cosine matrix.

MRP_TO_GIBBS.description: Convert Modified Rodrigues Parameters to Gibbs vector.

GIBBS_TO_MRP.description: Convert Gibbs vector to Modified Rodrigues Parameters.

B_MATRIX_GIBBS.description: Return the Gibbs-vector B matrix that maps body angular rate to Gibbs derivative.

B_INV_MATRIX_GIBBS.description: Return the inverse Gibbs-vector B matrix that maps Gibbs derivative to body angular rate.

D_GIBBS.description: Compute Gibbs derivative from Gibbs vector and body angular rate vectors.

ADD_PRV.description: Compose two principal rotation vector rotations.

SUB_PRV.description: Compute the relative principal rotation vector from VECTOR_B to VECTOR_A.

EP_TO_PRV.description: Convert scalar-first Euler parameters/quaternion to principal rotation vector.

PRV_TO_EP.description: Convert principal rotation vector to scalar-first Euler parameters/quaternion.

DCM_TO_PRV.description: Convert direction cosine matrix to principal rotation vector.

PRV_TO_DCM.description: Convert principal rotation vector to direction cosine matrix.

MRP_TO_PRV.description: Convert Modified Rodrigues Parameters to principal rotation vector.

PRV_TO_MRP.description: Convert principal rotation vector to Modified Rodrigues Parameters.

GIBBS_TO_PRV.description: Convert Gibbs vector to principal rotation vector.

PRV_TO_GIBBS.description: Convert principal rotation vector to Gibbs vector.

B_MATRIX_PRV.description: Return the principal-rotation-vector B matrix that maps body angular rate to PRV derivative.

B_INV_MATRIX_PRV.description: Return the inverse principal-rotation-vector B matrix that maps PRV derivative to body angular rate.

D_PRV.description: Compute principal rotation vector derivative from PRV and body angular rate vectors.

ADD_EULER.description: Compose two Euler-angle rotations using EULER_SEQUENCE.

SUB_EULER.description: Compute the relative Euler-angle rotation from VECTOR_B to VECTOR_A using EULER_SEQUENCE.

EULER_TO_DCM.description: Convert Euler angles to direction cosine matrix using EULER_SEQUENCE.

DCM_TO_EULER.description: Convert direction cosine matrix to Euler angles using EULER_SEQUENCE.

EULER_TO_EP.description: Convert Euler angles to scalar-first Euler parameters/quaternion using EULER_SEQUENCE.

EP_TO_EULER.description: Convert scalar-first Euler parameters/quaternion to Euler angles using EULER_SEQUENCE.

EULER_TO_MRP.description: Convert Euler angles to Modified Rodrigues Parameters using EULER_SEQUENCE.

MRP_TO_EULER.description: Convert Modified Rodrigues Parameters to Euler angles using EULER_SEQUENCE.

EULER_TO_GIBBS.description: Convert Euler angles to Gibbs vector using EULER_SEQUENCE.

GIBBS_TO_EULER.description: Convert Gibbs vector to Euler angles using EULER_SEQUENCE.

EULER_TO_PRV.description: Convert Euler angles to principal rotation vector using EULER_SEQUENCE.

PRV_TO_EULER.description: Convert principal rotation vector to Euler angles using EULER_SEQUENCE.

B_MATRIX_EULER.description: Return the Euler-angle B matrix that maps body angular rate to Euler-angle derivative.

B_INV_MATRIX_EULER.description: Return the inverse Euler-angle B matrix that maps Euler-angle derivative to body angular rate.

D_EULER.description: Compute Euler-angle derivative from Euler angles and body angular rate vectors.

TILDE_MATRIX.description: Return the skew-symmetric tilde matrix that maps VECTOR_A cross products.

M1_ROTATION_MATRIX.description: Return the Basilisk AVS one-axis elementary direction-cosine matrix for ANGLE_RAD.

M2_ROTATION_MATRIX.description: Return the Basilisk AVS two-axis elementary direction-cosine matrix for ANGLE_RAD.

M3_ROTATION_MATRIX.description: Return the Basilisk AVS three-axis elementary direction-cosine matrix for ANGLE_RAD.

INVALID_INPUT.description: Request is missing required vector/quaternion data or has invalid values.

UNSUPPORTED_OPERATION.description: Operation is unknown or not supported by the module implementation.

RBKVector3.description: Three-vector used for MRP, Gibbs, PRV, angular rate, and related attitude math values.

RBKQuaternion.description: Scalar-first Euler parameter/quaternion record, matching Basilisk EP ordering.

RBKMatrix3.description: Row-major 3x3 direction cosine matrix, matching Basilisk C matrix ordering.
